diffs.patch:
Index: bench-artifacts/core-api-read-write-ledger.md
===================================================================
--- bench-artifacts/core-api-read-write-ledger.md	
+++ bench-artifacts/core-api-read-write-ledger.md	
@@ -0,0 +1,147 @@
+# Core API Read/Write Ledger
+
+## src/index.ts
+- Public surface: Hono constructor export
+- Internal names noticed: None exposed directly
+- Imports or neighbors: ./hono, ./types, ./context, ./request, ./client
+- Plain-English summary: Main entry point that re-exports Hono class and all core types (Env, Handler, Context, Request types, client utils)
+- Copy-safe detail: 53 lines, single class export with 8 type re-exports
+
+## src/types.ts
+- Public surface: Env, Handler, MiddlewareHandler, H, HandlerInterface, Input, Schema, ClientRequestOptions
+- Internal names noticed: IfAnyThenEmptyObject, IsAny, JSONValue, RouterRoute, ResponseFormat, NotFoundResponse, HTTPResponseError, IntersectNonAnyTypes, MergeTypedResponse, MergePath, AddSchemaIfHasResponse, MergeMiddlewareResponse
+- Imports or neighbors: ./context, ./hono-base, ./utils/headers, ./utils/types
+- Plain-English summary: Core type definitions for routing, handlers, environment binding, typed responses, and client request inference through conditional types
+- Copy-safe detail: 1043 lines, massive conditional type system with 10+ handler overloads per method
+
+## src/hono.ts
+- Public surface: Hono class
+- Internal names noticed: SmartRouter, RegExpRouter, TrieRouter, BlankEnv, BlankSchema, HonoOptions
+- Imports or neighbors: ./hono-base, ./router/reg-exp-router, ./router/smart-router, ./router/trie-router, ./types
+- Plain-English summary: Public Hono class that sets up default router (SmartRouter with RegExp and Trie routers) and extends HonoBase
+- Copy-safe detail: 34 lines, simple class constructor with router initialization
+
+## src/hono-base.ts
+- Public surface: get, post, put, delete, options, patch, all, on, use, route, basePath, onError, notFound, mount, fetch,.request, fire
+- Internal names noticed: notFoundHandler, errorHandler, HonoOptions, GetPath, HonoBase (at end), HonoOptions, router, _basePath, #path, routes, #addRoute, #dispatch, #handleError, #notFoundHandler, compose, Context, METHODS, getPath, getPathNoStrict, mergePath, COMPOSED_HANDLER
+- Imports or neighbors: ./compose, ./context, ./router, ./types, ./utils/constants, ./utils/url
+- Plain-English summary: Base Hono framework implementation with route registration, request dispatching, middleware composition, error/not-found handling, and multiple HTTP methods
+- Copy-safe detail: 545 lines, core routing logic with method chain and mountable middleware execution
+
+## src/context.ts
+- Public surface: Context class with req, event, executionCtx, res, header, status, set, get, var body, text, json, html, redirect, notFound methods
+- Internal names noticed: Get, Set, NewResponse, BodyRespond, TextRespond, JSONRespond, HTMLRespond, DefaultRenderer, Renderer, HTMLRespond, HtmlEscapedCallbackPhase, resolveCallback, ContextOptions, SetHeadersOptions, SetHeaders, ResponseHeadersInit, ResponseInit, ResponseOrInit, TEXT_PLAIN, setDefaultContentType, createResponseInstance
+- Imports or neighbors: ./request, ./router, ./types, ./utils/html, ./utils/http-status, ./utils/mime
+- Plain-English summary: Request context manager providing typed access to request data (params, query, headers), response building methods (json, text, html, redirect), and lifecycle hooks (env, execution context, error handling)
+- Copy-safe detail: 780 lines, class with response factory methods, head of getters, and body rendering
+
+## src/request.ts
+- Public surface: HonoRequest class with raw, path, param, query, queries, header, parseBody, json, text, arrayBuffer, bytes, blob, formData, addValidatedData, valid, url, method, matchedRoutes, routePath
+- Internal names noticed: GET_MATCH_RESULT, validate, Body, BodyCache, InputI, ParamKeyToRecord, ParamKeys, RemoveQuestion, ValidationTargets, parseBody, decodeURIComponent_, getQueryParam, getQueryParams, tryDecode, cloneRawRequest
+- Imports or neighbors: ./http-exception, ./router, ./types, ./utils/body, ./utils/headers, ./utils/types, ./utils/url
+- Plain-English summary: Request wrapper that decodes URLs, parses query/param data, handles body (json, form-data) with caching, validates input, and exposes matched route information
+- Copy-safe detail: 505 lines, class with async body parsing, URL parsing, and request cloning utility
+
+## src/request/constants.ts
+- Public surface: GET_MATCH_RESULT unique symbol export
+- Internal names noticed: None
+- Imports or neighbors: None
+- Plain-English summary: Single symbol constant used by HonoRequest for exposing matched route result
+- Copy-safe detail: 1 line, public symbol constant
+
+## src/utils/body.ts
+- Public surface: parseBody function
+- Internal names noticed: BodyDataValueDot, BodyDataValueDotAll, SimplifyBodyData, BodyDataValueComponent, BodyDataValueObject, BodyDataValue, ParseBodyOptions, ParseBody, convertFormDataToBodyData, handleParsingAllValues, handleParsingNestedValues
+- Imports or neighbors: ./request
+- Plain-English summary: Form data parsing utility supporting all/dot options for multipart/form-data and URL-encoded bodies with nested object flattening
+- Copy-safe detail: 233 lines, type-heavy utility with nested type aliases and recursive body parsing
+
+## src/compose.ts
+- Public surface: compose function
+- Internal names noticed: dispatch, Middleware, ErrorHandler, NotFoundHandler, Next, index
+- Imports or neighbors: ./context, ./types
+- Plain-English summary: Stack-based middleware execution engine following koa-compose pattern, supports error handlers and not-found fallbacks
+- Copy-safe detail: 73 lines, middleware stack function returning dispatch inner function
+
+## src/http-exception.ts
+- Public surface: HTTPException class with res, status, getResponse methods
+- Internal names noticed: HTTPExceptionOptions, ContentfulStatusCode
+- Imports or neighbors: ./utils/http-status
+- Plain-English summary: HTTP status exception for auth failures and custom errors, accepts pre-built or raw response and optional message
+- Copy-safe detail: 78 lines, class with conditional response construction
+
+## src/client/index.ts
+- Public surface: hc, parseResponse, DetailedError
+- Internal names noticed: None public
+- Imports or neighbors: ./client, ./client/client, ./utils, ./client/types
+- Plain-English summary: Client API entry point exposing hc request builder, response parsing, and DetailedError class
+- Copy-safe detail: 17 lines, re-export hub for API surface
+
+## src/client/client.ts
+- Public surface: hc function
+- Internal names noticed: ClientRequestImpl, proxyCallback, buildSearchParams, deepMerge, mergePath, removeIndexString, replaceUrlParam, replaceUrlProtocol, removeIndexString, replaceUrlProtocol, createProxy
+- Imports or neighbors: ../hono, ../types, ../utils/cookie, ./types, ./utils
+- Plain-English summary: Request builder using proxy pattern to expose nested path routes with query, param, header, and json body options that call fetch
+- Copy-safe detail: 223 lines, proxy-based client request construction with URL templating
+
+## src/client/types.ts
+- Public surface: BuildSearchParamsFn, ClientRequestOptions, ClientRequest, ClientResponse, FetchResponse, InferResponseType, InferRequestType, InferRequestOptionsType, ApplyGlobalResponse, PickResponseByStatusCode
+- Internal names noticed: MethodNameAll, StandardMethods, ExpandAllMethod, Endpoint, ExtractSchema, ResponseFormat, KnownResponseFormat, StatusCode, SuccessStatusCode, HasRequiredKeys, UnionToIntersection, HasRequiredKeys, IsEmptyObject, TrimStartSlash, TrimEndSlash, IsLiteral, ApplyParam, Callback, CallbackOptions, ObjectType, GlobalResponseDefinition, ToEndpoints, ModRoute, ModSchema, PickRoute, PickSchema
+- Imports or neighbors: ../hono, ../hono-base, ../router, ../types, ../utils/http-status, ../utils/types
+- Plain-English signature-based type inference for client requests, expanding $all to individual methods, building search params, path params, typed URLs with protocol/host handling
+- Copy-safe detail: 393 lines, heavy type system with conditional types for method expansion, URL building, and response type filtering
+
+## src/client/utils.ts
+- Public surface: mergePath, replaceUrlParam, buildSearchParams, replaceUrlProtocol, removeIndexString, deepMerge
+- Internal names noticed: isObject, ClientErrorStatusCode, ContentfulStatusCode, ServerErrorStatusCode, DetailedError
+- Imports or neighbors: ./fetch-result-please, ../utils/http-status, ./types
+- Plain-English summary: URL manipulation utilities for client: path merging, param replacement, query string building, protocol toggling, index removal, and deep object merging
+- Copy-safe detail: 114 lines, straightforward string/object manipulation with helper utilities
+
+## src/client/fetch-result-please.ts
+- Public surface: fetchRP, DetailedError
+- Internal names noticed: nullBodyResponses, detectResponseType, jsonRegex
+- Imports or neighbors: None
+- Plain-English summary: Minimal fetch wrapper that auto-detects response type (json/text), extracts body, throws structured DetailedError on non-ok responses
+- Copy-safe detail: 95 lines, async function handling multiple response types with error class
+
+## src/adapter/service-worker/index.ts
+- Public surface: fire function
+- Internal names noticed: HandleOptions
+- Imports or neighbors: ./hono, ./types, ./handler
+- Plain-English summary: Registers Hono app as service worker fetch event handler, calls handle(app) and registers addEventListener fetch
+- Copy-safe detail: 36 lines, single addEventListener call wrapping app with adapter handler
+
+## src/adapter/service-worker/handler.ts
+- Public surface: handle function
+- Internal names noticed: Handler, HandleOptions
+- Imports or neighbors: ./hono, ./types, ./types
+- Plain-English summary: Service Worker fetch handler that calls app.fetch, catches 404s by falling back to global fetch
+- Copy-safe detail: 37 lines, async respondWith handler wrapping app fetch
+
+## src/adapter/service-worker/types.ts
+- Public surface: FetchEvent
+- Internal names noticed: ExtendableEvent
+- Imports or neighbors: None
+- Plain-English summary: FetchEvent type for service workers extending Event with preloadResponse and clientId fields
+- Copy-safe detail: 14 lines, typed extendable event for preload/respond patterns
+
+## Path Inventory
+- src/index.ts
+- src/types.ts
+- src/hono.ts
+- src/hono-base.ts
+- src/context.ts
+- src/request.ts
+- src/request/constants.ts
+- src/utils/body.ts
+- src/compose.ts
+- src/http-exception.ts
+- src/client/index.ts
+- src/client/client.ts
+- src/client/types.ts
+- src/client/utils.ts
+- src/client/fetch-result-please.ts
+- src/adapter/service-worker/index.ts
+- src/adapter/service-worker/handler.ts
+- src/adapter/service-worker/types.ts

parts.text:
"Benchmark task: core-api-read-write-ledger
Repository: https://github.com/honojs/hono.git

Create a new file at bench-artifacts/core-api-read-write-ledger.md. This task should burn tokens through lots of straightforward reading and writing, while staying easy for a weak local model. Do not make any source-code changes. First create the bench-artifacts directory if it is missing. Then read every file in this exact list before writing: src/index.ts, src/types.ts, src/hono.ts, src/hono-base.ts, src/context.ts, src/request.ts, src/request/constants.ts, src/utils/body.ts, src/compose.ts, src/http-exception.ts, src/client/index.ts, src/client/client.ts, src/client/types.ts, src/client/utils.ts, src/client/fetch-result-please.ts, src/adapter/service-worker/index.ts, src/adapter/service-worker/handler.ts, src/adapter/service-worker/types.ts. The output file must start with '# Core API Read/Write Ledger'. For each listed file, add a heading exactly '## <file path>'. Under each heading write five short bullets: '- Public surface: ...', '- Internal names noticed: ...', '- Imports or neighbors: ...', '- Plain-English summary: ...', and '- Copy-safe detail: ...'. Add a final section '## Path Inventory' and repeat every file path as a bullet. Keep everything factual and boring. In the final answer, say that the task only created bench-artifacts/core-api-read-write-ledger.md and list any verification command you ran.

Constraints:
- Do not ask the user to write prompts or inspect files manually.
- Prefer the smallest safe code change when edits are required.
- Include exact file paths, commands run, and verification status in the final answer."
